title: No Singleplayer Pausing
description: A Simple Mod that makes the game continue to run when paused in Single Player
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8a5f8695-7e4f-42ee-aff9-a44f49663696.png)](https://shorturl.at/xbl6X)

  
This mod has a singular purpose, which is to prevent the single-player pause menu from pausing the game. When the game is paused in single player, the game will continue to run as if it weren't paused.  
  
This was made due to a request on Discord
